# InvoicePro

> InvoicePro is a premium invoice generator that lets you create professional invoices with beautiful templates, manage clients, track payments, and grow your business. Upload your own invoice design or use premium templates.

## Pages

- [/](/): Landing page with features, pricing, and FAQ.
- [/auth](/auth): Sign up and login page.
- [/dashboard](/dashboard): Dashboard with analytics, recent activity, and quick actions.
- [/invoices/create](/invoices/create): Create and edit invoices with multiple templates.
- [/invoices/history](/invoices/history): View, filter, and manage all past invoices.
- [/clients](/clients): Manage client directory and view client invoice history.
- [/business](/business): Manage business profiles and branding settings.
- [/templates](/templates): Upload custom templates and map fields with the drag-and-drop editor.
- [/tools](/tools): Business utility tools for terms, proposals, and contracts.
- [/recurring](/recurring): Set up and manage recurring invoices.
- [/settings](/settings): App settings including currency, theme, and email preferences.
